performance.quarterRevenueDescription: Waliigala ETB mo’atoonni piipilaayinii qorraa UTC kana keessatti cufamanii fi galmeewwan gurgurtaa yeroo tokkoof. Galmee duraan mo’ata waliin hidhame dachaa hin lakkaa’amu.
performance.noQuarterTargetHint: No personal target dated range overlaps this quarter yet.
performance.quarterRevenueFootnote: Create dated targets in Settings; any personal target whose range overlaps this quarter is summed for the bar above.
performance.creditBaseDescription: Combined paying pipeline credit base plus Sales log amounts this quarter that are not already on a paying pipeline row (one-off or pre-paying logs).
performance.estimatedCommissionDescription: {rate}% of the combined credit base above (policy: up to {months} months per deal — confirm with finance). Quick Add with a pipeline customer increases pipeline credit base; one-off sales add to the desk portion.
performance.estimatedCommissionFootnote: Monthly-style estimate; includes linked Quick Add amounts once they land on paying accounts.
performance.accountMixDescription: Active prospects vs. paying vs. at-risk or ended.

insights.pipelineTouchpointsDescription: Every interaction you log from Pipeline (notes, calls, emails, meetings) shows up here so nothing disappears into a dialog.
insights.logInsightDescription: Objections, feature requests, demo wins, and patterns you want peers to see (toggle share).
insights.title: Title
insights.yourLogDescription: Rows you created plus items teammates marked as shared.

alerts.createFollowUpDescription: Renewals, payment nudges, credit expiry, or CS escalation.
alerts.title: Title
alerts.suggestedDescription: Heuristic list: non-paying, CS flag, renewal or credit window within ~45 days.
alerts.openRemindersDescription: Auto reminders from renewals, credit dates, non-paying status, and CS flags. Mark done when you have followed up.

reporting.orgDescription: Where the whole team’s visible prospects cluster — refine outbound by segment.
reporting.yoursDescription: Where your owned prospects cluster — refine outbound by segment.
reporting.addLeadsHint: Add leads to see segment mix.
reporting.stageMixOrg: Accounts by stage across the org (visible to you).
reporting.recentOrgDescription: Latest logged objections and wins from the team.
reporting.recentYoursDescription: Use objections and wins to tune messaging.
reporting.logInsightsHint: Log insights in the Insights tab.

prospects.customersDescription: Waryt Furniture teams track showroom and field leads here: business or account name, contact person, email, features of interest, and pain points. Edit any card in place, or pick a letter to page through accounts by name.
prospects.empty: No accounts yet — add one from Pipeline.
prospects.letterTablist: Filter by first letter of company name
prospects.filtersHint: Filter prospects by search text, industry, stage, and account status.
prospects.searchMatchesHint: Matches include every company name letter. Clear search to browse A–Z by letter.
prospects.showAllInGroup: Show all companies in this group ({count})

pipelineActivity.title: Pipeline interactions
pipelineActivity.description: Notes, calls, emails, and meetings you logged from Pipeline — newest first.
pipelineActivity.empty: Nothing here yet — open Pipeline, pick a lead, and use "Log interaction" to add a note or call summary.

salesDesk.title: Sales desk
salesDesk.subtitle: Taskforce logs sales here anytime—no waiting. Set your target up front, then filter, export CSV, or use the form below.
salesDesk.logSaleDescription: Same data as Quick Add—full fields when you need customer or notes.
salesDesk.noProspectsHint: Add prospects in Waryt Studio first—every desk sale is linked to someone in your pipeline.
salesDesk.customerLabelHint: Overrides pipeline name in exports if set
salesDesk.filtersOrg: Managers and admins see organization-wide entries.
salesDesk.noYourEntriesOnPage: No entries from you on this page—adjust filters or page.

quickAdd.title: Add sale
quickAdd.description: Choose a pipeline company first. For full amount, pick cash or cheque. For credit, set the due date (presets or custom) — we add reminders in Alerts.
quickAdd.pickCompanyHint: Select a customer from your pipeline to enter sale details.
quickAdd.noProspects: Add prospects in Waryt Studio before logging a quick sale.
quickAdd.wonPaying: Won & paying — close today, credit base + amount
quickAdd.logOnly: Log sale only — keep current stage & status
quickAdd.openCreditHint: Collect or mark these paid in the Sales log before opening another credit here.
quickAdd.payingWonBody: Log this sale on the desk only unless you add a fresh pipeline lead for a new purchase. “Won & paying” is disabled so you do not re-close the same deal.
quickAdd.openCreditBlock: This customer still has open credit. Mark the existing credit collected in the Sales log first.
quickAdd.payingWonSyncBlocked: This account is already won and paying — choose “Log sale only” or add a new pipeline lead for another purchase.
